description: A composite image. The left side is a booking-style photograph of an adult man with short dark hair against a light wall. The upper right shows a small inset headshot of a woman labeled Kathy Arceneaux. The lower right is a clipping of a newspaper obituary text headed Arceneaux last rites in Miss., the body text too small to read fully. The image combines a portrait and printed news text.
notable_text: Kathy Arceneaux; Arceneaux last rites in Miss.
